rationale: Review 2 catches the more material placement problem confirmable from the diff: the public API is generic bialgebra/Hopf-algebra convolution machinery, not an algebraic-group/functor-of-points construction yet, so splitting it under Bialgebra/HopfAlgebra would leave a better organized PR. Review 1's private-helper namespace point is real but narrower, while Review 2's PR-description finding could not be confirmed from the shown diff and is not decisive.
